title: Spontex Washups General Purpose Sponge Scourers, Long Lasting, 4 count (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
HIGH QUALITY. The UK's leading cleaning products conveniently packed into A bigger pack format
EFFICIENT. Strong, versatile and long-lasting sponge scourers that are ideal for everyday washing up and lots more
ANTI-GREASE. Made with exclusive anti-grease technology, which prevents the retention of grease, these sponge scourers stay cleaner and more efficient for longer
EASY TO USE. Designed with a specially contoured nail-guard for improved grip and protection
VERSATILE: General Purpose Scourer, do not use on non-stick pans
description: From the manufacturer Spontex Washups General Purpose Sponge Scourers, Pack of 4 Spontex Washups are strong and long lasting. Thanks to their anti-grease technology, the scourers don't retain grease and stay cleaner and efficient for longer. They're ideal for all your daily washing up and lots of other tasks around the house. Do not use on non-stick pans or delicate surfaces. Spontex make cleaning better, quicker and easier Spontex are proud to call themselves the champion of less effort! They’ve dedicated over 80 years to creating products that make housework less time consuming, easier to get done and whenever possible, a bit more fun! Choose any of their high quality cloths, sponges, scourers, gloves, mops or brooms and you can be sure that they’ve used their know how to add an extra trick to make household tasks better, quicker and easier.
